name: Infinite Financial Services
description_short: Multi-service financial firm offering mortgage services, tax preparation, business planning, and retirement consulting for consumers and small businesses.
description_long:
Infinite Financial Services is a Miami-based financial services company located at 1717 N. Bayshore Dr, STE 3252, Miami FL 33132. The company claims over 20 years of experience helping clients achieve financial health through multiple service channels. IFS positions itself as a full-service financial advisor for both consumer and business needs, emphasizing accessibility to underserved populations.

The company's service portfolio spans consumer services (mortgages, retirement planning, tax services), business services (business registration, business taxes, business planning), and tax preparation. They market mortgage solutions specifically to self-employed individuals, those with bankruptcy history, and consumers with bad credit. Their website emphasizes expedited home purchase timelines and claims to handle complex financial situations. Business clients can access tax filing, business structure consultation, and comprehensive business planning services.

IFS differentiates itself through explicit messaging around serving difficult credit profiles and marketing a "second chance" philosophy. They operate extended hours (Mon-Sat 10 AM-6 PM, closed Sundays) and provide phone-based consultation. Website testimonials highlight professional service and multiple-family client relationships. The company uses a callback request system and emphasizes free initial consultations for tax and mortgage services.

However, the profile presents significant limitations. Website content lacks specifics on loan terms, rates, APR ranges, approval timelines, or regulatory licensing details. No information appears about FHA/VA credentials, mortgage insurance options, or business loan structures. The statistics section displays placeholder zeros for "Businesses Helped," "Taxes Filed," and "Satisfied Customers," suggesting the website may be under development or not actively maintained. No verifiable regulatory or licensing information is provided, and the company appears primarily service-referral based rather than direct lender.
address: 1717 N Bayshore Dr Suite 3252, Miami, FL 33132

company_info.headquarters: 1717 N Bayshore Dr Suite 3252, Miami, FL 33132

pros: Explicitly targets underserved populations including self-employed, bankruptcy filers, and those with bad credit
Offers bundled services (mortgages, tax prep, business planning, retirement) under one firm
Extended operating hours (10 AM-6 PM Mon-Sat) with free consultation callbacks available
Claims 20+ years of experience in financial services
Provides business registration and compliance support alongside lending services
Local Miami presence with direct phone contact (877-666-6143)
Testimonials cite professional and courteous service approach
cons: Website statistics show placeholder zeros for customer metrics, indicating incomplete or outdated information
No specific loan terms, interest rates, APR ranges, or approval timelines disclosed
No verifiable regulatory licensing information (NMLS, state mortgage license, etc.) provided
Business model appears referral-based rather than direct lending; actual lending capacity unclear
Website content is duplicated/repetitive across pages with incomplete service descriptions
best_for: Self-employed individuals or business owners seeking mortgages with flexible credit requirements
Small business owners needing bundled tax, registration, and business planning services
Consumers with bankruptcy or poor credit history exploring home purchase options
Business owners requiring comprehensive tax and business structure consultation
diagnosis: Infinite Financial Services targets small business owners and credit-challenged consumers seeking comprehensive financial services in a single location. The primary caveat is that the website provides no verifiable credentials, loan terms, rates, or regulatory information—essential data for assessing legitimacy and suitability. Prospective clients should independently verify licensing status (NMLS for mortgages, state registration for tax/business services) before engagement.
services: Mortgage lending for self-employed, bankruptcy cases, and bad credit applicants
Consumer tax services and refund maximization
Free initial financial consultation (phone callback system)
